title: Chronic Pain | MedlinePlus
text:
le, but treatments can help. Treatments may include medicines, including pain relievers . There are also non-drug treatments , such as acupuncture , physical therapy, and sometimes surgery.
Depending on the cause of your pain and your symptoms, your provider may also recommend lifestyle changes which may include suggestions for:
Improving mental health 
Managing stress 
Getting to and staying at a healthy weight 
Adding low-impact exercise
